pi_items.source: seed_library.py lines 493-621 define DECADES_PAPERS dataset; seed_hierarchical_reorg function (line 1115) inserts all 30 papers into 'Unsorted Import' collection

privileged_info_summary: Task dataset contains 30 real academic papers spanning 1934-2021 (social sciences, philosophy, humanities) synthetically inserted into Zotero's Unsorted Import collection. Papers are distributed as: Pre-1960 (8 papers: years 1934-1957), 1960-1999 (10 papers: years 1960-1992), 2000-2010 (7 papers: years 2000-2009), and Post-2010 (5 papers: years 2014-2021). Year boundaries for sorting are: < 1960, 1960-1999 inclusive, 2000-2010 inclusive, and > 2010. Total of 30 papers must be moved from flat 'Unsorted Import' collection into hierarchical 'Research Archive' structure with four subcollections.
